description: Installs and manages autonomous posting via cron. Reads content-calendar.md for scheduled posts, auto-publishes reviewed content at scheduled times. NOT for one-shot immediate posting.

cases.query: Set up auto-posting. I want my reviewed content to go out on a schedule without me touching anything.
Schedule my posts for next week. I want them published automatically at the best times each day.
Install the autopilot cron job. I want content posted every morning at 9am from my calendar.
Put my posting on autopilot. I have reviewed content queued up and want it shipped without manual intervention.
I want autonomous posting. Set up the cron so reviewed content gets published on its own schedule.
Schedule my content to go out automatically. I've reviewed everything, just need the automation set up.
Post without me. I'm going on vacation and want my content calendar to keep publishing while I'm gone.
Automate my posting schedule. The content-calendar.md has dates and times, just wire up the cron to execute it.
forbotsake-cron install. I want the 30-minute cron running for my content calendar.
Enable scheduled posting. I have 12 posts in my content calendar and I want them to go out over the next two weeks automatically.
Check the status of my cron. Is autopilot running? When is the next scheduled post?
Pause the auto-posting. I need to hold off on publishing until I fix my strategy.
Publish this post to X right now. The content is reviewed and ready, I just need it posted immediately.
Post this to LinkedIn right now. Don't schedule it, I want it live this second.
Ship this content immediately. No scheduling, just one-shot post it to Twitter.
What should I post this week? Build me a content calendar with topics and channels.
Create a content plan for the next month. I need to know what topics to write about.
Write a Twitter thread about our pricing change. Needs to be developer-friendly and honest.
Review this post before I publish. Check if the tone matches my brand voice.
Do marketing for this project. Run the full pipeline from strategy through publishing.
What worked this week? Show me a marketing retrospective with engagement data.
How should I market this product? Help me figure out positioning and channels from scratch.
